seoTitle: Mount Harris vs Mount Horeb — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Harris and Mount Horeb. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Harris vs Mount Horeb: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Harris and Mount Horeb.
heading: Mount Harris vs Mount Horeb — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Harris, New South Wales and Mount Horeb, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Horeb has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Mount Harris (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Harris or Mount Horeb safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Harris has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Mount Horeb scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Harris scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Horeb scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Harris or Mount Horeb?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Horeb has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
